title: Crypto ATM bans, restrictions now in effect in Tennessee and Georgia
summary: Crypto ATM's are fast disappearing in the US as Tennessee’s ban goes into effect today while operators in Minnesota have until Aug. 1 to comply with a similar law.

title: Anchorage Digital brings off-exchange settlement to Binance
summary: The integration addresses one of the biggest obstacles keeping institutional capital on the sidelines of crypto markets: exchange counterparty risk.

title: Dealmakers 'Unlock the Magic' with Care Bears Sale
summary: Jeff Collins, Managing Partner at Cloverlay, joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." IVEST Consumer Partners and Cloverlay announced the sale of Care Bears to Authentic Brands Group. They discuss the deal and the value of intellectual property. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: M&A Environment Healthy: Top M&A Firm
summary: Melissa Sawyer, global head of M&A Sullivan & Cromwell, joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." Global transaction values were up around 30% year over year to $2.6 trillion in the first half, according to data compiled by Bloomberg. That puts dealmakers on course to potentially set a record. title: Trump-Backed American Bitcoin Hits New Low Price Ahead of Reverse Stock Split
summary: Bitcoin mining firm American Bitcoin fell to a new low price Wednesday, one day before executing a 1-for-15 reverse stock split.

title: BitMine, Sharplink and Joe Lubin Accelerate Wall Street Ethereum Push With Nonprofit Launch
summary: Ethereum Institutional will serve as a point of contact for financial institutions seeking to get more involved with on-chain infrastructure.

title: Robinhood Chain goes live on mainnet alongside 24/7 tokenized stocks, Lighter perps and planned crypto agentic trading
summary: Robinhood Chain, a Layer 2 built using Arbitrum's tech stack, went live on public mainnet, with partners including Uniswap from day one.

title: Venice AI raises $65 million Series A at $1 billion equity valuation led by Dragonfly
summary: Erik Voorhees' crypto-AI startup Venice has raised $65 million in a Series A funding round at a $1 billion equity valuation, led by Dragonfly.

summary: The US president earned more than $1bn from digital currency interests as well as real estate and stock trades
